name: Fletcher Building Limited
analysis: FBU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.6900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.7100, stop A$2.4750, target A$3.0600 (1.49:1) — then trail it.
